Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: A major focus is on China's "economic development" (經濟發展), "marketization reform," and "US-China trade and strategic competition," directly addressing Target 8.1 on economic growth.

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: Discusses "industrialization" (工業化) and "technology development" (科技發展), particularly its use in governance and social control, linking to Target 9.5 on technological capabilities.

Reduced Inequalities.reason: Analyzes "social differentiation" (社會分化) and the "weakening of the household registration system" (戶籍制度的弱化), a key driver of inequality, linking to Target 10.3.

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: Mentions "urbanization" (都市化) as a characteristic of China's modernization, providing a tangential link to Target 11.3, but this is not a central theme.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The course's core is the study of "authoritarian survival," "regime stability," and "international relations," directly addressing peace and institutional structures (Targets 16.1, 16.6).

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: Analyzes "international relations," "US-China trade and strategic competition," and its impact on the "world order," linking to global policy coherence and stability (Targets 17.13, 17.14).
